hooks.command: echo 'RE-GROUND FIRST: FROGS 5 Skyrim campaign. Before asserting any story fact or doing design work, read CLAUDE.md and Toryggs legacy/AI_README, then open the actual source (narrative chapters read IN ORDER are authoritative; trackers lag). Never state campaign canon from memory or the context summary.'

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CANON-WRITE CHECK: If this edits a source-of-truth doc (The Narrative/, world state tracking/, web/, Players/, Npcs/, factions/, Adventure modules/), verify every factual claim against source (cite chapter/line) before saving. Silent inaccuracies in canon are the worst failure mode."}}'

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"GATES (every reply, no exceptions): G1 CITATION GATE -- no canon claim, dialogue draft, or scene prose goes to the GM unless THIS message shows the source check first: file + line, QUOTED, not just claimed checked. G6 DIALOGUE GATE -- any line of dialogue for a named character needs an explicit pass/fail check against WRITING GUIDE Section IX rules 0-7, shown inline, before the line is presented. Re-verify EVERY factual claim in a draft against source immediately before showing it -- a prior citation earlier in the conversation does not cover a new line written after it. Do not invent attributions, event order, or character reactions that are not directly sourced."}}'
